#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_light_battery
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_heavy_battery
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_dp_light_battery
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_dp_light_battery
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_shock_hardening_techniques
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_light_shell
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_heavy_shell
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_light_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_heavy_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_dp_light_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery = {
    # basic_battery Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gw_artillery Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = gw_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_artillery Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = interwar_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_battery Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_shell Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_shell }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

    }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = railway_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery1 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1939

            NOT = { has_tech = artillery1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_battery Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_dp_light_battery Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery2 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_dp_light_battery Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery3 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_shock_hardening_techniques Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_shock_hardening_techniques }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_shock_hardening_techniques
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery4 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1942

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_variable_time_fuze_shells Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1942
    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_shell Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_shell }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_shell
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # artillery5 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1943

            NOT = { has_tech = artillery5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery

        add_technology = artillery5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_battery Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1944

            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # advanced_heavy_battery Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1944

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (13 techs) ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    # basic_heavy_tank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech }

        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1943

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ LAND / INFANTRY (31 techs) ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬

# infantry_weapons
#   year=1918 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# support_weapons
#   year=1918 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_weapons1
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# paratroopers
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# marines
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry

# rangers_tech
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_weapons2
#   year=1938 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_special_forces
#   year=1938 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# support_weapons2
#   year=1938 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# improved_infantry_weapons
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# paratroopers2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# marines2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_mountaineers2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# rangers_tech2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# improved_infantry_weapons_2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_special_forces
#   year=1940 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# improved_special_forces
#   year=1940 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# support_weapons3
#   year=1940 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_at
#   year=1942 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_infantry_weapons
#   year=1942 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# extreme_environment_training
#   year=1942 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# survival_training
#   year=1942 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# support_weapons4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_at2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# paratroopers3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# marines3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_mountaineers3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# rangers_tech3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_infantry_weapons2
#   year=1944 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# elite_forces
#   year=1944 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

arm_grant_land_infantry = {
    # infantry_weapons Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons1 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # paratroopers Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = paratroopers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = paratroopers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = marines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = marines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mountaineers Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_mountaineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rangers_tech Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rangers_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = rangers_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons2 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_special_forces Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_special_forces }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_special_forces
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons2 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_infantry_weapons Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_technology = paratroopers2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_technology = rangers_tech2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_technology = advanced_special_forces

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_technology = infantry_at2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_technology = paratroopers3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (8 techs) ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    # gwtank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ LAND / MECHANISED (5 techs) ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1944 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    # mechanised_infantry Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (6 techs) ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1938 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

        add_technology = basic_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1940

            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks = {
    # main_battle_tank Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬ LAND / MOTORISED (2 techs) ГўвЂќв‚¬ГўвЂќв‚¬

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised = {
    # tech_trucks Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = tech_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1936 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 deps=[motorised_infantry]

# tech_logistics_company

#   year=1936 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 deps=[radio, motorised_infantry]

# tech_engineers2

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_military_police4

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_maintenance_company4
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_field_hospital4
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_logistics_company4
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_signal_company4
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# night_vision2
#   year=1946 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_support = {
    # basic_train Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = basic_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_support Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_support
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_military_police
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_tech = motorised_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = motorised_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_signal_company Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = radio
            has_tech = motorised_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_signal_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_engineer_tech Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1938

            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_engineer_tech }

        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_engineer_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital3 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_logistics_company3 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_signal_company3 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_signal_company3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # night_vision Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = night_vision }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = night_vision
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers4 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon4 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police4 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

        add_technology = tech_military_police4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company4 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital4 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_logistics_company4 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_signal_company4 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_signal_company4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # night_vision2 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = night_vision2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = night_vision2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    # armored_car1 Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_td Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_art Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_art }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic

    # basic_medium_art Гўв‚¬вЂќ 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
